hero.buyHeading: Find your ideal property to buy in Portugal
hero.buySubheading: Compare prices and features from thousands of properties for sale. Search by region, type, or price and find your dream home.
hero.rentHeading: Find your ideal property to rent in Portugal
hero.rentSubheading: Compare prices and features from thousands of rental properties. Search by region, type, or price and find your perfect home.

homepage.heading: Every listing. One search.
homepage.subheading: Predileto aggregates property listings from dozens of Portuguese real estate portals into a single search. Compare prices, locations, and features without jumping between websites.

booking.agreementText: By scheduling this visit, you agree to our terms of service. The visit will be scheduled after your documents are verified. You will receive an email confirmation with the date and time of the visit. Your personal data will be processed in accordance with our privacy policy.
booking.agreementCheckbox: I have read and accept the terms and conditions
booking.nifRequired: NIF or passport number is required
booking.utilityBillDescription: Upload a recent proof of address
booking.dropzoneText: Drag files or click to select
booking.successMessage: You will receive an email confirmation shortly. We will contact you to confirm the date and time of the visit.
